# Water splitting in photosynthesis

## Short Teaching Summary
Water splitting in photosynthesis: In photosystem II (PSII), the electron comes from the splitting of water, which releases oxygen as a waste product. Key detail: Energy from sunlight is used in the photosystem II (PSII) reaction center to extract electrons from water. Map connection: this idea links by example_of, requires to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
